entry.name: icon
entry.label: The name of the icon used in the compact representation (e.g. on a small panel).

entry.name: menuLabel
entry.label: Text label for the Panel button

entry.name: appNameFormat
entry.label: The format used in the display of application names: 0 = NameOnly, 1 = GenericNameOnly, 2 = NameAndGenericName, 3 = GenericNameAndName

entry.name: favorites
entry.label: List of general favorites. Supported values are menu id's (usually .desktop file names), special URLs that expand into default applications (e.g. preferred://browser), document URLs and KPeople contact URIs.

entry.name: systemFavorites
entry.label: List of system action favorites.

entry.name: favoritesPortedToKAstats
entry.label: Are the favorites ported to use KActivitiesStats to allow per-activity favorites

entry.name: systemApplications
entry.label: List of applications at the top of the "Computer" tab.

entry.name: paneSwap
entry.label: Whether to swap the sidebar and content panes

entry.name: favoritesDisplay
entry.label: How to display favorites: 0 = Grid, 1 = List

entry.name: applicationsDisplay
entry.label: How to display applications: 0 = Grid, 1 = List

entry.name: alphaSort
entry.label: Whether to sort menu contents alphabetically or use manual/system sort order.

entry.name: compactMode
entry.label: Whether to use a compact display style for list items

entry.name: switchCategoryOnHover
entry.label: Whether to allow switching category items on hover

entry.name: customWidth
entry.label: Custom width for the full representation. 0 = automatic.

entry.name: customHeight
entry.label: Custom height for the full representation. 0 = automatic.

entry.name: customSideBarWidth
entry.label: Custom sidebar width. 0 = automatic.

entry.name: fadeOnExit
entry.label: Fade the screen to black when triggering shutdown/restart/logout.

entry.name: showLockScreen
entry.label: Show Lock Screen in leave menu.

entry.name: showLogout
entry.label: Show Log Out in leave menu.

entry.name: showSaveSession
entry.label: Show Save Session in leave menu.

entry.name: showSwitchUser
entry.label: Show Switch User in leave menu.

entry.name: showSuspend
entry.label: Show Suspend/Sleep in leave menu.

entry.name: showHibernate
entry.label: Show Hibernate in leave menu.

entry.name: showReboot
entry.label: Show Restart in leave menu.

entry.name: showShutdown
entry.label: Show Shut Down in leave menu.
